name: transcription_transcribe
description: Transcribe pre-recorded audio from a URL or file upload. Supports 100+ languages, speaker diarization, punctuation, sentiment analysis, entity detection, and more.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: URL of audio/video file to transcribe.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: AI model to use (nova-3, nova-2, enhanced, base).

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: BCP-47 language tag for the audio.

parameters.name: punctuate
parameters.description: Add punctuation and capitalization to transcript.

parameters.name: diarize
parameters.description: Recognize speaker changes in the audio.

parameters.name: summarize
parameters.description: Generate a summary of the transcript.

parameters.name: detect_entities
parameters.description: Extract named entities from the transcript.

parameters.name: topics
parameters.description: Detect topics discussed in the audio.

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: URL for async callback with results.

alternatives.transcript: Hello, welcome to the meeting. Today we will discuss...
